git.noreplyDetected: The current email is a GitHub noreply email, which helps protect your real email.
git.noreplyTip: The current email is not a GitHub noreply email. Public commits may expose your real email.
git.noreplyGenerateTip: Enter your GitHub username to generate a noreply email. If GitHub shows a numeric ID format, use the value from GitHub settings.
git.pushDefaultTip: Recommended: simple. It pushes the current branch to its upstream branch with the same name, which fits most daily workflows.
git.lineEndingTip: For cross-platform teams, use a shared policy. core.ignorecase affects whether filename case-only changes are detected.
git.editorTip: Recommended: code --wait, so merge commits and rebase messages open directly in VS Code.
git.noHooks: No active hooks in this repository
